items.question: What is WinkSocial?
items.answer: WinkSocial is the Wink content workflow for planning, generating, approving, and publishing hotel social content with booking routes attached.

items.question: Who uses WinkSocial?
items.answer: Hotels use WinkSocial to keep content planning, review, approval, and publishing close to hotel offers and campaigns.

items.question: Where should visitors go next?
items.answer: Explore WinkSocial or request a demo to see how every post pairs with a bookable link that settles at 5.5% all-in.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
